Class CookingStationService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.cooking.station.CookingStationService
public class CookingStationService extends Object
Manages all active cooking stations: loads state from block PDC, runs the once-per-second tick loop that advances cooking and consumes fuel, and fires CookingStartEvent / CookingCompleteEvent so skills can adjust cook time, quality, and XP. Output fills five slots; when none can take the result the item drops at the block. Stations with no viewers that cannot progress are persisted to PDC and evicted.

    Returns the location of the station currently open for the given player, or null.

    Returns the in-memory state of the station at the given location, or null.
    boolean

    Returns true if the given item is a recognised fuel.

    Opens the cooking station GUI for the given player at the given block.
    void

    Replaces the recipe list, fuel list, and config used for future ticks.
    void
    rushCook(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID activatorUuid)
    Immediately completes the current recipe at the station the given player has open, attributing the completion to activatorUuid.
    boolean

    Immediately completes the current recipe at the given station block, attributing the completion to activatorUuid.

    Applies a change to the fuel slot of the station the player has open.

    Sets the mastery accessor used to read and record per-player recipe cook counts.

  • Constructor Details

    • CookingStationService

      public CookingStationService(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, List<CookingRecipe> recipes, Map<org.bukkit.Material, Integer> fuels, CookingStationGui gui, CookingConfig config)
      Parameters:
      plugin - the owning plugin
      recipes - all loaded cooking recipes
      fuels - map of fuel material to burn time in ticks
      gui - the GUI factory used to open and update station inventories
      config - the core cooking config (quality weights, formats, mastery)

  • Method Details

    • setLevelProvider

      public void setLevelProvider(Function<UUID,Integer> levelProvider)
      Sets the provider used to look up a player's cooking skill level. Call from SkillsBridge once Sylphian-Skills is confirmed present.
      Parameters:
      levelProvider - function returning the skill level for a given UUID

    • setMasteryAccessor

      public void setMasteryAccessor(MasteryAccessor masteryAccessor)
      Sets the mastery accessor used to read and record per-player recipe cook counts. Call from SylphianCooking.onEnable() after the mastery manager is ready.
      Parameters:
      masteryAccessor - the mastery accessor

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts the background tick loop. Call from JavaPlugin.onEnable().

    • shutdown

      public void shutdown()
      Stops the tick loop and persists all active station states to PDC.

    • openStation

      public void openStation(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, org.bukkit.block.Block block)
      Opens the cooking station GUI for the given player at the given block. Loads PDC state if this is the first time the station is being accessed.

    • syncFromInventory

      public void syncFromInventory(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, org.bukkit.inventory.Inventory inv)
      Flushes the current contents of an open GUI inventory directly into the in-memory station state. Call this before closeStation(Player) to guarantee that any items moved in the same tick as the close are captured before the PDC write.

    • takeOutput

      public @Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack takeOutput(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, int idx, int amount)
      Removes up to amount items from the given output slot of the station the player has open and returns the removed stack. The station state is updated synchronously and viewers are refreshed, so a removed item cannot be repainted back by a concurrent tick refresh.
      Parameters:
      player - the player taking the output
      idx - the output slot index (0–4)
      amount - the maximum number of items to remove
      Returns:
      the removed stack, or null if nothing could be taken

    • closeStation

      public void closeStation(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Called when a player closes their cooking station GUI. Saves state to PDC and evicts if idle.

    • getOpenStationLocation

      public @Nullable org.bukkit.Location getOpenStationLocation(UUID uuid)
      Returns the location of the station currently open for the given player, or null.

    • getState

      public @Nullable CookingStationState getState(org.bukkit.Location location)
      Returns the in-memory state of the station at the given location, or null.

    • destroyStation

      public void destroyStation(org.bukkit.block.Block block)
      Handles the destruction of a cooking station block. Closes any open GUIs, drops stored items, removes in-memory state, and clears PDC.

    • setIngredient

      public void setIngredient(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, int ingredientIdx, @Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Applies a change to an ingredient slot of the station the player has open.

    • setFuel

      public void setFuel(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, @Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Applies a change to the fuel slot of the station the player has open.

    • isValidFuel

      public boolean isValidFuel(@Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Returns true if the given item is a recognised fuel.

    • rushCook

      public void rushCook(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID activatorUuid)
      Immediately completes the current recipe at the station the given player has open, attributing the completion to activatorUuid. Used by active cooking abilities.

    • rushCookAt

      public boolean rushCookAt(org.bukkit.block.Block block, UUID activatorUuid)
      Immediately completes the current recipe at the given station block, attributing the completion to activatorUuid. Loads the station from PDC if it is not resident. Used by the Second Wind active ability.
      Returns:
      true if a recipe was active and completed, false if there was nothing to cook

    • armPerfectSear

      public void armPerfectSear(org.bukkit.block.Block block)
      Primes the given station so its next completed quality cook rolls Perfect. Loads the station from PDC if it is not resident. Used by the Perfect Sear active ability.

    • reload

      public void reload(List<CookingRecipe> newRecipes, Map<org.bukkit.Material, Integer> newFuels, CookingConfig newConfig)
      Replaces the recipe list, fuel list, and config used for future ticks.
